description:
No spec subject — instrumentation/observation log carved out of specled_-f98 (closed) so the one remaining unfixed flake observation is not lost.

specled_-f98 observations 2 and 4 were root-caused as test-quality defects and fixed (commit 2a90f74: verifier_test timeout budget 300->2000ms; spec_check_test SPECLED_SHOW_INFO hermeticity). Observation 1/3 — test/specled_ex/compiler/tracer_test.exs:241 merge_edges stream_data property fails once under full-suite/merged load, passes 21/21 in isolation — was NOT fixed because it is not a defect.

elixir-test-critic assessment (two independent passes): merge_edges/3 is a pure function over in-memory maps (no ETS, no file, no shared state, no real-manifest mutation). All four asserted invariants (key set, session-caller provenance, canonical callees, idempotence) hold universally by construction; no counterexample derivable by analysis. Given a fixed ExUnit seed, StreamData generation is deterministic and load-independent, so a genuine shrunk counterexample would reproduce in isolation at that seed, and none does. Most likely cause: under a saturated scheduler the 100-iteration check-all overran the 60s ExUnit test-slot timeout, surfacing as an EXIT/timeout in this test slot rather than an assertion failure — a suite-capacity artifact, not a property or product bug.

Instrumentation-only. Do NOT weaken the property.

If it recurs (ExUnit prints the seed at run start), capture:
- Failure MODE: assertion failure (prints a shrunk counterexample: previous / session_edges / session_modules) vs EXIT timeout. That single fact decides counterexample vs timeout-artifact.
- If a counterexample: reproduce with mix test test/specled_ex/compiler/tracer_test.exs:241 --seed <ci_seed>. Reproduces in isolation => the invariant or merge_edges has an edge the analysis missed. Does not => timeout-artifact theory confirmed.
- Low-risk hardening if confirmed as timeout-under-load: bound the property runtime under a load profile (e.g. lower max_runs) or record the seed in CI output so flaked-once becomes flaked-at-seed-N.
title: Capture seed if tracer merge_edges property (tracer_test.exs:241) flakes again
